chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-135 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of main case 23-01-2025. Mr. Muhammad Ishaq Ali, Advocate for the Petitioner Barrister Ahsan Ali Shah files vakalatnama on behalf of the Respondent No.3, which is taken on record. It is jointly stated that the application for refund filed by the Petitioner for the tax year 2023 shall be determined by the Department expeditiously preferably within 60 days after providing opportunity of hearing to the Petitioner vide a speaking order. Therefore, the petition may be disposed of as aforesaid. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad PS
